screens.name: Welcome
screens.purpose: Program overview and value proposition for new users

screens.name: About You
screens.purpose: Collect name, age, medication history, and activity level

screens.name: Concerns
screens.purpose: Identify user struggles and reasons for coming off GLP-1

screens.name: Weight & Goals
screens.purpose: Collect current weight, goal weight, and body metrics

screens.name: Baseline Assessment
screens.purpose: All 8 self-assessment questions on a single scrollable page (rated 1–5 each)

screens.name: Your Personalized Plan
screens.purpose: Show personalized 16-week roadmap and per-question feedback

screens.name: Home — CGM Active
screens.purpose: Dashboard with live glucose graph, block goal, habits, and GPA strip

screens.name: Home — CGM Off
screens.purpose: Dashboard with average-day glucose card and elevated hunger coach

screens.name: Home — Weight Loss
screens.purpose: Home state during active weight-loss phase with trend graph

screens.name: Home — Maintenance
screens.purpose: Home state during maintenance phase with band tracking

screens.name: Toolkit
screens.purpose: Scrollable graduation timeline, CGM schedule, education, and block goals

screens.name: Week 1 — Baseline
screens.purpose: Block 1 detail: observe glucose patterns, log meals and hunger

screens.name: Week 2 — Protein
screens.purpose: Block 1 continued: protein-at-every-meal introduction

screens.name: Week 3 — Fiber
screens.purpose: Block 2: add fiber foundation alongside protein habits

screens.name: Week 5 — Satiety Plate
screens.purpose: Block 3: build balanced satiating meals with CGM validation

screens.name: Week 8 — Walking
screens.purpose: Block 4: post-meal walking and movement habits

screens.name: Week 10 — Portions
screens.purpose: Block 5: personalized focus on portion awareness

screens.name: Week 13 — Locked
screens.purpose: Block 7: locked state with unlock requirements displayed

screens.name: Week 16 — Graduation
screens.purpose: Block 8: final CGM comparison and graduation criteria check

screens.name: Week 4 Check-In Intro
screens.purpose: Introduction to first post-foundation self-assessment

screens.name: Week 8 Check-In Intro
screens.purpose: Introduction to mid-program self-assessment

screens.name: Week 12 Check-In Intro
screens.purpose: Introduction to post-foundation check-in with focus selection

screens.name: Self-Assessment
screens.purpose: 8-question self-assessment matching baseline format

screens.name: Check-In Feedback
screens.purpose: Personalized feedback comparing scores to baseline

screens.name: Focus Selection
screens.purpose: Choose 1–2 focus areas for personalized blocks 5–8

screens.name: Daily Log
screens.purpose: Log hunger, food, exercise, water, sleep, and glucose notes

screens.name: Hunger Questionnaire
screens.purpose: Daily hunger/fullness rating check-in with glucose-aware feedback

screens.name: Hunger Coach Landing
screens.purpose: Personalized coach home with stats, glucose context, and scenario selection

screens.name: Still Hungry After Eating
screens.purpose: Scenario entry: user ate but still feels hungry

screens.name: Still Hungry — Under 15 Min
screens.purpose: Branch: ate less than 15 minutes ago, wait for satiety signals

screens.name: Still Hungry — What You Ate
screens.purpose: Branch: review meal composition for satiety gaps

screens.name: Still Hungry — Carb Heavy
screens.purpose: Branch: meal was carb-heavy, add protein/fat next time

screens.name: Still Hungry — Balanced Meal
screens.purpose: Branch: meal was balanced, explore portion size or timing

screens.name: Still Hungry — Stomach vs Mouth
screens.purpose: Branch: distinguish physical hunger from mouth hunger

screens.name: Still Hungry — Physical
screens.purpose: Branch: confirmed physical hunger, guidance to eat more

screens.name: Still Hungry — Mouth Hunger
screens.purpose: Branch: mouth hunger identified, distraction and awareness tips

screens.name: I'm Starving
screens.purpose: Scenario entry: user feels extremely hungry

screens.name: Starving — Ate Long Ago
screens.purpose: Branch: last meal was 4+ hours ago, eat now

screens.name: Starving — Ate Recently
screens.purpose: Branch: ate recently but starving, check glucose and meal composition

screens.name: Starving — Morning Hunger
screens.purpose: Branch: intense morning hunger, normalize post-GLP-1 appetite return

screens.name: I'm Having a Craving
screens.purpose: Scenario entry: user is experiencing a specific food craving

screens.name: Craving — Sweet
screens.purpose: Branch: sweet craving, explore blood sugar dips and alternatives

screens.name: Craving — Salty
screens.purpose: Branch: salty craving, check hydration and electrolytes

screens.name: Craving — Rich/Fatty
screens.purpose: Branch: craving rich food, assess caloric intake and fat needs

screens.name: Craving — Specific Food
screens.purpose: Branch: craving a specific food, mindful indulgence approach

screens.name: Not Hungry but Want to Eat
screens.purpose: Scenario entry: user wants to eat without physical hunger (HALT check)

screens.name: HALT — Actually Hungry
screens.purpose: Branch: HALT check reveals genuine hunger, guidance to eat

screens.name: HALT — Angry/Stressed
screens.purpose: Branch: emotional eating trigger, stress management tools

screens.name: HALT — Lonely
screens.purpose: Branch: loneliness trigger, connection and distraction strategies

screens.name: HALT — Tired
screens.purpose: Branch: fatigue trigger, rest and energy-boosting guidance

screens.name: Not Sure What I'm Feeling
screens.purpose: Scenario entry: user can't identify hunger signals (body scan)

screens.name: Body Scan — Results
screens.purpose: Summary of body scan findings and recommended action

screens.name: Body Scan — Physical Hunger
screens.purpose: Branch: body scan reveals physical hunger signals

screens.name: Body Scan — Boring Food Test
screens.purpose: Branch: apply boring food test to confirm true hunger

screens.name: Body Scan — Craving Detected
screens.purpose: Branch: body scan reveals craving rather than hunger

screens.name: Body Scan — Still Unsure
screens.purpose: Branch: still unclear after scan, gentle default guidance

screens.name: Hungry at an Unusual Time
screens.purpose: Scenario entry: hunger at an unexpected time of day

screens.name: Unusual Time — Late Night
screens.purpose: Branch: late-night hunger, assess sleep and evening routine

screens.name: Unusual Time — Afternoon
screens.purpose: Branch: afternoon hunger dip, check lunch composition

screens.name: Unusual Time — Early Morning
screens.purpose: Branch: early morning hunger, review dinner timing and content

screens.name: Unusual Time — Post-Workout
screens.purpose: Branch: post-exercise hunger, normalize and refuel guidance

screens.name: About to Eat — Check In
screens.purpose: Scenario entry: pre-meal hunger level assessment

screens.name: About to Eat — Low Hunger
screens.purpose: Branch: not very hungry before eating, consider waiting or smaller portion

screens.name: About to Eat — Sweet Spot
screens.purpose: Branch: hunger at ideal level, eat mindfully

screens.name: About to Eat — Very Hungry
screens.purpose: Branch: extremely hungry, slow-eating strategies to avoid overeating

screens.name: Just Finished Eating
screens.purpose: Scenario entry: post-meal fullness and satisfaction check

screens.name: Post-Meal — Just Right
screens.purpose: Branch: satisfied after eating, positive reinforcement

screens.name: Post-Meal — Too Full
screens.purpose: Branch: overate, reflect without judgment and plan next meal

screens.name: Post-Meal — Not Sure
screens.purpose: Branch: uncertain about fullness, set a 20-min timer to reassess

screens.name: Post-Meal — Still Hungry
screens.purpose: Branch: still hungry after meal, explore meal composition

screens.name: Post-Meal Hungry — Low Protein
screens.purpose: Sub-branch: meal lacked protein, add 25g+ next time

screens.name: Post-Meal Hungry — Small Portion
screens.purpose: Sub-branch: portion was too small, adjust serving sizes

screens.name: Post-Meal Hungry — Ate Fast
screens.purpose: Sub-branch: ate too quickly, try 20-minute meal pacing

screens.name: Post-Meal Hungry — Balanced Meal
screens.purpose: Sub-branch: meal was balanced, may need larger portions during transition

screens.name: My Hunger Is Changing
screens.purpose: Scenario entry: user notices hunger pattern shifts during GLP-1 tapering

screens.name: Hunger Changing — More Hungry
screens.purpose: Branch: appetite increasing, normalize post-GLP-1 return

screens.name: Hunger Changing — Less Hungry
screens.purpose: Branch: appetite still suppressed, ensure adequate nutrition

screens.name: Hunger Changing — Unpredictable
screens.purpose: Branch: hunger signals are erratic, tracking and pattern-finding

screens.name: Hunger Changing — Different Type
screens.purpose: Branch: hunger feels different than before medication, relearn signals

screens.name: Teach Me About Hunger
screens.purpose: Mini-lesson library: deep-dive education on hunger science

screens.name: Outcome — Paused
screens.purpose: Follow-up: user paused and waited before eating

screens.name: Outcome — Ate Intentionally
screens.purpose: Follow-up: user chose to eat with intention and awareness

screens.name: Outcome — Satisfied
screens.purpose: Follow-up: user feels satisfied with their decision

screens.name: Outcome — Learn More
screens.purpose: Follow-up: user wants deeper education on the topic

screens.name: Weekly Check-In
screens.purpose: End-of-week habit review and reflection prompt

screens.name: Insights — Lifestyle
screens.purpose: Lifestyle GPA drill-down with habit scores and trends

screens.name: Insights — Glucose
screens.purpose: Glucose GPA with sensor comparisons and time-in-range charts

screens.name: Insights — Graduation
screens.purpose: Graduation readiness dashboard with criteria tracking

screens.name: Education — CGM Basics
screens.purpose: Long-form article on what CGM measures and how to read your graph

screens.name: Education — Protein Anchor
screens.purpose: Long-form article on protein's role in satiety and muscle preservation

screens.name: Education — Walking & Glucose
screens.purpose: Long-form article on post-meal walking and glucose response

screens.name: Game — Protein Guess
screens.purpose: Interactive quiz: estimate protein content in common meals

screens.name: Game — Build Balanced Plate
screens.purpose: Interactive activity: assemble a satiating plate with correct ratios

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: User profile, preferences, maintenance band, and program reset

screens.name: Program Details
screens.purpose: Detailed program metrics, dose history, and graduation readiness

screens.name: Body Scanner
screens.purpose: Camera-based body composition scan for progress tracking
